items.title: Using projects in ChatGPT
items.excerpt: Learn how to use orojects in ChatGPT to organize chats, files, and instructions, manage ongoing work, and collaborate more effectively.

items.title: Prompting fundamentals
items.excerpt: Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT.

items.title: Using skills
items.excerpt: Learn how to create and use ChatGPT skills to build reusable workflows, automate recurring tasks, and ensure consistent, high-quality outputs.

items.title: Analyzing data with ChatGPT
items.excerpt: Learn how to analyze data with ChatGPT by exploring datasets, generating insights, creating visualizations, and turning findings into actionable decisions.

items.title: Creating images with ChatGPT
items.excerpt: Learn how to create and refine images with ChatGPT using clear prompts, iterate on designs, and generate high-quality visuals in minutes.

items.title: andresrodriguez55/knowledge-base — Knowledge Copilot is a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) application with multi tenant isolation based on  LDAP for companies.  It allows organizations to interact with their private document libraries securely,  providing accurate answers with transparent quality scoring, source citations and traceability.
items.excerpt: Knowledge Copilot is a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) application with multi tenant isolation based on  LDAP for companies.  It allows organizations to interact with their private document libraries securely,  providing accurate answers with transparent quality scoring, source citations and traceability.

items.title: Gemma 4: Byte for byte, the most capable open models
items.excerpt: Gemma 4: Our most intelligent open models to date, purpose-built for advanced reasoning and agentic workflows.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.excerpt: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

items.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
items.excerpt: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
items.excerpt: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

items.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
items.excerpt: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.
